content.speakerText: So to recap — you’ll join feedback sessions, aim for the cert, and I’ll set up mentorship. Sound good?
content.speakerTextCn: 总结一下：你参加反馈会、考认证，我安排导师，这样可以吗？

options.text: Perfect — thanks for the clarity and support!
I guess so, but I’m not sure I can do it.
Can we change the plan? I don’t like the cert.
Okay, but don’t forget to pay me extra.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了积极认可和感谢，符合职场礼貌结束对话的语境。干扰项中，第二个表达犹豫和消极，第三个提出反对，第四个要求加薪，均不符合专业、积极收尾的语境。

content.speakerText: Thanks again for your hard work this year — looking forward to next one!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今年的付出，期待明年一起继续！

options.text: Thank you for the opportunity — I’m excited to grow here!
Yeah, I guess I did okay.
Next year I’ll take more vacation.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应感谢并表达成长意愿，符合职场正面收尾。干扰项中，第二个语气消极，第三个偏离主题，第四个表达消极离职态度，均不合适。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate how you handled the project — let’s wrap this up on a positive note.
content.speakerTextCn: 我很感谢你处理这个项目的方式，让我们以积极的方式结束吧。

options.text: Thanks! I’ll keep you posted on the next steps.
Do I have to write a report?

content.explanation: 正确答案礼貌回应并承诺后续跟进，体现专业态度。干扰项语气生硬、抱怨或转移话题，不符合‘积极结束’的场景要求。

content.template: So to recap — you’ll join feedback sessions, aim for the cert, and I’ll set up mentorship. ___ good?
content.hint: 这是对总结性内容表示认可的常用口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Sounds good（表示认可）

content.template: Thank you for the opportunity — I’m excited to ___ here!
content.hint: 表达在公司长期发展的积极意愿
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：grow here（在某地成长）

content.template: I really appreciate your support. ___ you around soon!
content.hint: 非正式但礼貌的道别方式，常用于职场结束对话
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：See you around（回头见）

content.speakerText: So to recap — you’ll join feedback sessions, aim for the cert, and I’ll set up mentorship. Sound good?
content.speakerTextCn: 总结一下：你参加反馈会、考认证，我安排导师，这样可以吗？
expectedAnswers: Perfect — thanks for the clarity and support!
That works for me. I’ll send a follow-up email to confirm.
Sounds good! I’m ready to get started.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表示认可并确认共识
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 clarity, support, follow-up 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks again for your hard work this year — looking forward to next one!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今年的付出，期待明年一起继续！
expectedAnswers: Thank you for the opportunity — I’m excited to grow here!
Appreciate it! I’ll keep pushing and do even better next year.
Thanks so much! Looking forward to working with you again.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感谢并积极回应未来合作
语言准确性：是否避免消极或不相关词汇
表达自然度：是否使用地道口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 opportunity, grow, pushing, looking forward 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’m glad we could align on the next steps. Let’s close this meeting here.
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴我们达成了下一步共识，我们就此结束会议吧。
expectedAnswers: Absolutely — thanks for your guidance. Have a great day!
Thanks for wrapping this up clearly. I’ll follow up by EOD.
Great meeting! Looking forward to implementing these actions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌结束并表达感谢或后续行动
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的结束语和时态
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度随意的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 align, wrap up, follow up, looking forward 等场景关键词
